generated_oml:
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy Sensor modeled in BIM, capturing occupancy data for the building control system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance IlluminationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illumination Sensor modeled in BIM, measuring interior light levels for dynamic lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminationDataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminationSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated by the SimulationService forecasting future energy consumption patterns"
]

instance LightingScheduleOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight suggesting optimal lighting schedules based on occupancy and daylight analysis"
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing recommended maintenance actions derived from task planning analytics"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reflecting current building operational status in real‑time telemetry"
]

instance AnalyticsDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing key performance indicators displayed within the analytics dashboard"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight enabling dynamic visual representation of building state within Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance OptimizeLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to dim or brighten light fixtures based on AdaptiveLightingService optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateMaintenanceScheduleAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action updating the maintenance schedule via TaskPlanningService recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and predictive analytics service forecasting energy consumption across building zones"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting optimization service that schedules light levels based on occupancy and daylight sensing"
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingScheduleOptimizationInsight, OptimizeLightingAction
]

instance TaskPlanningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Task planning service generating maintenance schedules and operational recommendations for facility managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceRecommendationInsight, UpdateMaintenanceScheduleAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service powered by Unreal Engine 5 presenting real‑time twin data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring service aggregating telemetry streams from physical sensors via Eclipse Hono"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance AnalyticsDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data analytics dashboard service providing visual analytics panels for building performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalyticsDashboardInsight
]

instance TwinManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing lifecycle and synchronization of device twin entities within Eclipse Ditto"
]

instance RuntimeModelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service facilitating deployment of runtime artifact models to the hosting environment"
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for ingesting JSON events from Eclipse Hono into the digital twin platform"
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑Driven Engineering tooling for automated extraction of semantics from BIM and runtime artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, AdaptiveLightingService, TaskPlanningService, RuntimeModelService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono integration providing MQTT connectivity for IEC devices and JSON event ingestion into Ditto entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AnalyticsDashboardService, DataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto twin management and data synchronization for device-level digital twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 renderer for interactive 3D visualization of the building and its twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM metadata model containing geometry, topology, and functional attributes of the building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RuntimeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime artifact model generated by model‑to‑model transformations for the digital twin execution"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry data stream of occupancy measurements published to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
]

instance IlluminationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry data stream of illumination measurements published to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler
]

instance LightFixtureActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Light fixture equipped with a controllable driver and dimming interface, controlled via the building control system"
]

instance ControlModule : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Control module that issues commands to light fixtures, with control logic defined in the BIM model"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, IlluminationSensor, LightFixtureActuator, ControlModule
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control messages generated by the digital twin are transmitted as JSON payloads through Ditto to Eclipse Hono, which forwards them to the building control system; BCS controllers consume these commands and actuate the physical devices."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time synchronization of telemetry and control messages with sub‑second latency; simulations and optimizations can be performed at configurable intervals such as every minute or triggered on demand."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Service‑oriented architecture: BIM model processor → MDE transformer → Hono/Ditto dispatcher → DT runtime engine (simulation, optimization) → visualization layer (Unreal) with optional DT services plugins"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (BIM modeling), Construction, Commissioning, Operation & Maintenance; the DT spans from design through operation, referencing design‑time models, as‑built data, and live operational data"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The OTTE metric assesses the correspondence between the digital and physical representations; consistency checks are performed during model validation to ensure that the twin accurately reflects the BIM derived assets."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication relies on Eclipse Hono as an MQTT broker, with Ditto providing CoAP/HTTPS endpoints for twin interaction; physical devices publish to Hono, which forwards messages to Ditto, and commands flow back in the same manner."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployment is conducted through the Hono/Ditto configurator, which provisions tenant and device entries and orchestrates the running of twin components in a scalable, service‑oriented runtime environment."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points in Ditto allow integration with third‑party OT platforms and external DT systems (e.g., HVAC, security)"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The twin adheres to IFC standards for BIM data and employs model‑driven transformations following the conventions outlined in the paper, ensuring interoperability within the AECO domain."
]
